channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Inappropriate language, 20th March
item.description:
Bus stop signage in need of curing of inappropriate language daubed on it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 295, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inappropriate language, 20th March
item.description:
Bust stop signage in need of curing of inappropriate language daubed on it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 295, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light not working, 20th March
item.description:
Faulty not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crossway, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overcrowding outside the fox, 20th March
item.description:
Fox pub is allowing people to spill all over the pavement, pedestrians are not able to pass safely
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 33 Kingswood Avenue NW6, 20th March
item.description:
Rubbish in gutter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingswood Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hamilton Road SE27 outside house 126 (, 20th March
item.description:
Hamilton Road SE27 outside house 126 (nearly outside Surrey Mews junction) is a road hole (as of Thursday night ie 19th) – may have been marked for repaired so in your records but if so not repaired for a ‘long time’ so please check. Picture attached. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 159, Hamilton Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish along walking path between Belmarsh prison and Iron Mountain building, 20th March
item.description:
The entire path is full of rubbish. Between Belmarsh prison and Iron Mountain building

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kentlea Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Private bins left on pavernt, 20th March
item.description:
20 orchard Road private home keep getting left out on the pavements since months. Please can you send a reminder to tenants to remove them int their own demise?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orchard Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lift out of order, 20th March
item.description:
Lift out of order onto Hungerford bridge northside.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23-26, Embankment Place, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green lane SE9 2AP, 20th March
item.description:
Street light is not working

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large hole 30 cm long filled with large sections of rumble, 20th March
item.description:
Surround of manhole cover is breaking up again. 3rd time in 12 months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell New Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bad motor oil spill all over the pavement., 20th March
item.description:
There is litter and rubbish near to Thurlow Towers (number 38 Knollys Road) BUT there is a motor oil spill all along the pavement covering about thirty feet in front of Thurlow Towers. It is hazardous for people and animals and needs cleaning up properly. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70, Knollys Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken loose and uneven paving slabs: trip hazard, 20th March
item.description:
This pavement, on south side of Wansey street, has not been repaired or replaced despite frequent complaints from residents. It is now a dangerous trip hazard for residents with mobility difficulty. Please urgently repair.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wansey Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 20th March
item.description:
This street light is not working when all others in the street are. Please can this be fixed swiftly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Sandlings Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Regular dumping hotspot, 20th March
item.description:
Ongoing problem from tenants!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsground, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Just before Arlington Road bus stop when heading up towards Regents Park area., 20th March
item.description:
Branches of the tree on Delaney Road hit the top left sides of the number 88 bus with such force that I thought it would scratch too it. It needs trimming because clearly it is hanging over the road. I cannot pin point the exact tree because I was inside the bus but everyone got scared. It’s one of the trees before the Arlington Road bus stop.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Delancey Street, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Harvist Road, eastbound lane, opposite number 52., 20th March
item.description:
Two large pieces (ca. 40x40x8cm) missing from speed bump, posing a high risk to cyclists and motorcyclists.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubish, 20th March
item.description:
Public car park Argent Street is full of rubish
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Little Thurrock, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shoot-Up Hill, in front of Mapesbury Court (NW2 3PU), 20th March
item.description:
A Tesco delivery van rammed into a 20mph sign - so the pole is no longer vertical. Happened on 20 March 2026 at 8:36am.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shoot Up Hill, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime E-bikes and Human Forest Parked Dangerously, 20th March
item.description:
Lime E-bikes and Human Forest Parked Dangerously at Swiss Court TWG Tea.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitcomb Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet
